questions.q: According to Sony's financial results announced in May 2026, the PlayStation 5 has shipped how many units worldwide?
Which actor and filmmaker is directing the upcoming Netflix AI thriller starring Jeff Daniels, Joel Edgerton, and Caleb McLaughlin, announced in May 2026?
Capcom announced on May 8, 2026, that their sci-fi hacking action-adventure game PRAGMATA surpassed what sales milestone in just 16 days?
Why did developer Beethoven & Dinosaur confirm in May 2026 that their coming-of-age game 'Mixtape' will not have a Streamer Mode?
options: Its levels are designed around licensed pop songs
The publisher refused to pay for Twitch streaming rights
Streamer modes cause lag during multiplayer
The game contains no copyrightable audio tracks
questions.correctText: Its levels are designed around licensed pop songs

questions.q: A May 2026 Weill Cornell Medicine study showed that flipping an immune system switch related to which cells could help stop gut inflammation?
A May 2026 Cornell University study suggested that marginal deficiency of which vitamin could negatively affect healthy aging and cellular metabolism?
According to a May 2026 announcement, which upcoming Benh Zeitlin film will reunite actors Paul Mescal and Jessie Buckley?
Which genetic variant was reported in May 2026 to explain why GLP-1 weight-loss medications don't work for about one in ten people?
Former President Donald Trump recently agreed with fan backlash over what issue regarding the 2026 FIFA World Cup?

According to a May 2026 report in The Atlantic, what is the specialty of Dr. Stephen Kornfeld, the passenger who had to take over medical duties during a deadly hantavirus outbreak on the MV Hondius cruise ship?
